Kandahar (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $4,813,132Details
International Box Office $2,975,462
Worldwide Box Office $7,788,594
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,389,796
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,312,955
Total $2,702,751
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,325,388 (48.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.07 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:61.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,105 opening theaters/2,105 max. theaters, 2.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $5,261,886

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 26th, 2023 (Wide) by Briarcliff Entertainment
International Releases: May 25th, 2023 (Limited), released as Kandahar (Беглец) (Russia (CIS))
May 31st, 2023 (Limited) (France)
June 2nd, 2023 (Wide), released as Kandahar: Misiune mortală (Romania)
June 8th, 2023 (Wide) (Netherlands)
June 16th, 2023 (Limited), released as Operación Kandahar (Spain)
Video Release: June 16th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence and language.
(Rating bulletin 2781 (cert #54074), 5/3/2023)
Geographical setting: Afghanistan
Plot point: C.I.A.
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Capstone Group LLC, Thunder Road Film, G-Base, MBC Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
